description: Fastlane accelerated guest checkout — recognizes returning buyers for one-click card payments

initialization.code: const sdkInstance = await window.paypal.createInstance({ clientToken, components: ['fastlane'] })

waterfall_component.description: Fastlane Waterfall Component for new/unrecognized customers
waterfall_component.note: Provides card fields with address autofill for unrecognized buyers

recognized_customer: 4. Retrieve saved card and shipping from profileData
5. Display saved payment method for one-click confirmation
6. Create order and capture on confirmation
new_customer: 4. Buyer fills card and address (with autofill assistance)
6. Card saved in Fastlane network for future use

server_requirements.client_token: Must generate client token with Fastlane scope

best_practices: Place email input early in checkout flow for early recognition
Show loading indicator during identity lookup
Handle both recognized and unrecognized flows gracefully
Fall back to standard Card Fields if Fastlane is not eligible
Test with sandbox Fastlane-enrolled test accounts
